summary: Iteration 154: Multiversal Layered Map System - ALL TESTS PASSED (33/33 backend, all frontend UI verified). New feature: 4-tier universe system (Terrestrial, Ethereal, Astral, Void) with Interlocking Logic Engine for cross-universe ripple effects, region exploration, NPC interactions, portal travel, and cosmic weather ascendant bonuses.
seed_data_creation: Created multiverse_test@test.com user for clean state testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multiversal Map System fully implemented and tested. Backend routes at /app/backend/routes/multiverse_map.py. Frontend at /app/frontend/src/pages/MultiverseMap.js. Key data-testids: multiverse-map-page, multiverse-back-btn, universe-terrestrial, universe-ethereal, universe-astral, universe-void, universe-selector, universe-map, region-{id}, region-detail, talk-npc-btn, portal-travel-btn, resonance-bars, ripple-toggle, ripple-feed, ascendant-badge. Universe regions: Terrestrial 7, Ethereal 7, Astral 7, Void 6. Each universe starts with 1 region discovered by default. Interlocking engine creates 3 ripples per exploration (one per other universe). Ascendant universe determined by zodiac season (currently Aries → Astral ascendant with +20% XP).

GET /api/multiverse/state.details: Returns all 4 universes with regions, resonance, discovery counts, ascendant info, recent_ripples

POST /api/multiverse/explore (new region.details: Discovers new regions, awards 30 XP + dust, triggers 3 interlocking ripples

POST /api/multiverse/explore (discovered.details: Gives reduced 10 XP but still triggers ripples

POST /api/multiverse/explore (inaccessib.details: Returns 403 for regions not connected to discovered regions

POST /api/multiverse/interact-npc.details: Returns NPC dialogue, +15 XP, +2 resonance, cross-universe ripples

POST /api/multiverse/travel.details: Switches current universe, persists in state

GET /api/multiverse/ripples.details: Returns ripple history and universe resonance for all 4 universes

Interlocking effects.details: Terrestrial explore creates ripples in Ethereal (reveal_npc), Astral (boost_loot), Void (calm_chaos)

Portal regions.details: Portal exploration auto-discovers target region in connected universe

Ascendant bonus.details: Ascendant universe (currently Astral) gives 20% XP bonus

Frontend /multiverse-map page.details: Page loads with header, 4 universe selectors, SVG map, resonance bars

Frontend universe switching.details: Clicking universe selector switches map view and highlights selection

Frontend SVG map.details: Discovered regions shown in color with labels, undiscovered as gray '?'

Frontend region detail panel.details: Clicking discovered region shows detail panel with NPC info and portal button

Frontend resonance bars.details: Universal Resonance bars display for all 4 universes with values

Frontend ripple feed.details: Interlocking Ripples toggle expands to show ripple history with source→target
